top_signals.title: Fed’s Favorite Gauge Is Seen Showing Faster Inflation
top_signals.summary: The latest update to the Federal Reserve’s favorite inflation gauge is unlikely to challenge a growing consensus at the US central bank around the need for interest-rate hikes this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: UK's information commissioner resigns over ‘inappropriate humour’
top_signals.summary: Writing on LinkedIn, Edwards said that while he has not agreed with how the investigation into him has been conducted, he has come to accept that his position “has become untenable.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
